zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey de Bohun I於1079年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，他的父親Humphrey de Bohun41歲，母親Ealgyph de Bayeaux39歲。他於大約1105年與Maud de Salisbury在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1120年被列為constable of england (royal standard bearer)。他去世於1123年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey de Bohun I于1079年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，他的父亲Humphrey de Bohun41岁，母亲Ealgyph de Bayeaux39岁。他于大约1105年与Maud de Salisbury在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1120年被列为constable of england (royal standard bearer)。他去世于1123年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey de Bohun I was born in 1079, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, his father, Humphrey de Bohun, was 41 and his mother, Ealgyph de Bayeaux, was 39. He married Maud de Salisbury about 1105, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1120, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as constable of england (royal standard bearer). He died in 1123, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey de Bohun I est né en 1079, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey de Bohun, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ealgyph de Bayeaux, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Salisbury environ 1105, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1120, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of england (royal standard bearer). Il est décédé en 1123, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey de Bohun I 1079 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey de Bohun 41 und seine Mutter Ealgyph de Bayeaux 39. Er hat um 1105 in Normandie, Frankreich Maud de Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1120, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of england (royal standard bearer) aufgeführt. Er starb 1123 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey de Bohun I è nato il nel 1079 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Humphrey de Bohun, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ealgyph de Bayeaux, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Salisbury circa 1105, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1120, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of england (royal standard bearer). Morì nel 1123, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun Iが1079年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Bohunは41歳，母Ealgyph de Bayeauxは39歳であった。約1105年にフランスノーマンディでMaud de Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1120年，41歳の時，職業はconstable of england (royal standard bearer)と記録されている。彼は1123年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun I(이)가 1079년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey de Bohun(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ealgyph de Bayeaux(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1105년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Maud de Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1120년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of england (royal standard bearer)이었다. 그는 1123년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey de Bohun I nasceu em 1079, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey de Bohun, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ealgyph de Bayeaux, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Salisbury aproximadamente 1105, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1120, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of england (royal standard bearer). Ele faleceu em 1123, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey de Bohun I родился в 1079 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey de Bohun было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ealgyph de Bayeaux, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Salisbury около 1105 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1120 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии constable of england (royal standard bearer). Он умер в 1123 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey de Bohun I nació en 1079, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey de Bohun, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ealgyph de Bayeaux, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Maud de Salisbury aproximadamente 1105, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1120, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of england (royal standard bearer). Murió en 1123, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
